eepR 0.5.0
  • Reference

renamed_tidy

Source: R/renamed_tidy.R
renamed_tidy.Rd

Minor modification of the tidy() function that renames the columns to be more intuitive and adds the left-hand and operator columns for lm objects

Usage

renamed_tidy(model)

Arguments

model

model fit from lm()

Value

data.frame

Examples

renamed_tidy(lm(mpg ~ wt, data = mtcars))
#> # A tibble: 2 × 7
#>   lh    op    rh              b    se     t        p
#>   <chr> <chr> <chr>       <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>    <dbl>
#> 1 mpg   ~     (Intercept) 37.3  1.88  19.9  8.24e-19
#> 2 mpg   ~     wt          -5.34 0.559 -9.56 1.29e-10
